title: CacheEntry
description: Schema for a cached reason-through result. Stored as JSON files in the cache/ directory.

cache_key.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalised task string

task_original.description: The original task string as provided by the user

task_normalised.description: The task string after normalisation (lowercase, whitespace-collapsed, flags stripped)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this cache entry was created

framework_version.description: Version of the reason-through framework that produced this result
